notes: Trigger evals for the consolidated Firecrawl CLI skill. Near-misses are included to protect ordinary repo work.

queries.query: Search the web for the latest Firecrawl CLI release and summarize the changelog.
Fetch https://example.com/pricing and tell me what plans are listed.
Map the docs site and find the page about webhooks.
Crawl everything under /docs for this product and save the markdown.
This pricing table is behind a button. Scrape it, click the annual toggle, and extract the data.
Parse ./reports/vendor-contract.pdf and summarize the termination clause.
Set up a recurring monitor for this changelog page and alert me when it changes.
Download this docs site for offline reference.
Run firecrawl init and setup skills.
Use a schema to extract pricing with evidence URLs from this site.
Check the .firecrawl cache before scraping this docs page again.
Reuse any existing Firecrawl scrape for this URL so we do not burn duplicate credits.
Use Firecrawl research to find relevant arXiv papers and GitHub issues.
Crawl the whole domain with subdomains and external links.
Use Firecrawl to upload and parse our private repo roadmap.
Open src/main.ts and rename the config variable.
Run git status and show me the dirty files.
Add FIRECRAWL_API_KEY to this Next.js app and wire the SDK endpoint.
Deploy the web app to Vercel.
